message:
chore: add policy test harness scratch file and sync beads issue tracker

test_bug.rs: Scratch harness for testing is_command_candidate() against
destructive commands (terraform destroy, helm uninstall). Used for
manual validation of the policy gate's command classification.

.beads/issues.jsonl: Sync local issue tracker state with latest bead
definitions, reflecting new mission policy preflight and blast-radius
analysis issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
